subcodes.first_line: Blessed be this Day wherein the Pen of God moveth in the arena of remembrance and utterance, and His Most Exalted Pen doth trace its course [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الیوم الذی تستن فیه یراعه الله فی میدان الذکر و البیان و قلمه الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @business; financial; property matters, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for forgiveness, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar
